arts.ttl: Chelsea advised to change their transfer plans if this one thing happens
arts.sum: Chelsea don’t need to sign a new striker if Nicolas Jackson keeps performing as well as he has done at the start of this season, according to pundit Troy Deeney. The Senegal international netted a brace in the Blues’ 3-0 win away to West Ham at the weekend, and fans will no doubt be encouraged […] The post Chelsea advised to change their transfer plans if this one thing happens appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: 'Intelligent': Tim Sherwood shares what he's noticed about Jadon Sancho compared to other wingers
arts.sum: 'He is a very, very intelligent footballer.'

arts.ttl: Moises Caicedo dominates for Chelsea as Todd Boehly and Behdad Eghbali watch on
arts.sum: Exactly 398 days after Moises Caicedo made his debut for Chelsea at West Ham United, the £115million signing continued to silence his doubters. Nicolas Jackson's first-half double and a strike from Cole Palmer in the second period means Chelsea's positive start to the season has continued.

arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd & Liverpool battle for Simons; Mudryk's final Chelsea chance
arts.sum: Man City have indicated a willingness to pay €100m (£83.7m) for Bayern Munich midfielder Jamal Musiala, who is also wanted by Real Madrid . Liverpool are ready to pay €120m (£100.5m) to sign 21-year-old Bayer Leverkusen midfielder Florian Wirtz .

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca: I'm in love with Wesley Fofana
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca was full of praise for defender Wesley Fofana after Chelsea's 3-0 win over West Ham in the Premier League on Saturday. The result marked yet another Premier League victory for new boss Maresca - who's lost just one game in the league so far this season, against Manchester City.
